subcodes.first_line: O Nazar! The eyes of the Wronged One are turned toward thee from the precincts of the prison, and He maketh mention of thee with a remembrance from which the lights have shone forth. Verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نظر توجه الیک لحاظ المظلوم من شطر السجن و ذکرک بذکر سطعت منه الانوار انه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God as sun, @suffering and imprisonment
